evals.expected_output: The skill applies the v6 to v7 rename: every BarcodeTracking* type becomes its BarcodeBatch* equivalent (mode, settings, listener, session, basic overlay), the com.scandit.datacapture.barcode.tracking.* package paths become com.scandit.datacapture.barcode.batch.* (capture / data / ui.overlay), and the factory pattern BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext(context, settings) is preserved. Provides the Android v6 to v7 migration guide URL.

assertions.text: BarcodeTracking is renamed to BarcodeBatch in the migrated code (semantic)
BarcodeTrackingSettings is renamed to BarcodeBatchSettings in the migrated code (semantic)
BarcodeTrackingListener is renamed to BarcodeBatchListener in the migrated code (semantic)
BarcodeTrackingSession is renamed to BarcodeBatchSession in the migrated code (semantic)
BarcodeTrackingBasicOverlay is renamed to BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay in the migrated code (semantic)
Import paths use com.scandit.datacapture.barcode.batch.capture for BarcodeBatch, BarcodeBatchSettings, BarcodeBatchListener, BarcodeBatchSession
No com.scandit.datacapture.barcode.tracking. import path remains in the migrated code blocks (semantic)
No BarcodeTracking-prefixed identifier remains in the migrated code blocks (semantic)
The factory call BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext(dataCaptureContext, settings) is used (the factory shape is unchanged)
The Android v6 to v7 migration guide URL https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/android/migrate-6-to-7/ is provided

evals.prompt: I'm bumping my Android MatrixScan Batch app from Scandit SDK v7 to v8. I already use BarcodeBatch (not the old BarcodeTracking). What do I need to change in my BarcodeBatch code?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that the BarcodeBatch API itself is unchanged from v7 to v8 — the factory BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext, the BarcodeBatchListener / onSessionUpdated callback, the overlays, and the camera/lifecycle pattern all stay the same. It does NOT tell the user to rename anything to BarcodeTracking or change the factory. It points to the Android v7 to v8 migration guide for any SDK-wide (non-BarcodeBatch) changes.

assertions.text: The skill states the BarcodeBatch mode/listener/overlay API is unchanged between v7 and v8 (semantic)
The skill does NOT instruct renaming BarcodeBatch back to BarcodeTracking (the rename was v6 to v7, already done) (semantic)
The skill does NOT instruct replacing BarcodeBatch.forDataCaptureContext( with a different factory or constructor (semantic)
The Android v7 to v8 migration guide URL https://docs.scandit.com/sdks/android/migrate-7-to-8/ is provided
